questions: What payment methods do you accept?
Are there any dietary restrictions you accommodate?
Can I host a private event?
What is your most popular dish?
answers: We are open Monday to Thursday 11 AM to 10 PM, Friday and Saturday 11 AM to 11 PM, and Sunday 12 PM to 9 PM.
Yes, we offer delivery through our website, phone, and third-party apps. Delivery is available within 5 km radius.
Typical delivery time is 30-45 minutes depending on your location and current order volume.
We accept cash, credit cards, debit cards, digital wallets (PayPal, Apple Pay), and cryptocurrency.
Yes, you can make reservations online through our website or call us at +1-800-RESTAURANT.
Yes, we have a dedicated vegetarian menu with 20+ options including salads, pasta, and plant-based proteins.
We accommodate vegan, gluten-free, nut-free, and dairy-free diets. Please inform us when ordering.
Orders can be cancelled free of charge up to 30 minutes before preparation begins.
Yes, we offer 15% discount for groups of 8 or more. Please call ahead to arrange.
Phone: +1-800-RESTAURANT, Email: info@restaurant.com, Address: 123 Main Street, City, State 12345
Yes, free high-speed Wi-Fi is available for all customers. Password available from staff.
Yes, we have private dining rooms available for events up to 100 people. Contact our event coordinator.
Our signature dish is the Pan-Seared Salmon with lemon butter sauce and seasonal vegetables.
Yes, we offer catering for events. Minimum order is 20 people. Contact us for a custom quote.
Peak hours are typically Friday-Saturday 7-9 PM and Sunday 1-3 PM. We recommend reservations.
